plan.name: binary-hello-love
plan.description: A portable TypeScript service workspace for Binary IDE. This workspace compiles with npm + TypeScript and can be directly runnable with Node.js after build. It uses CommonJS-compatible TypeScript and exports callable functions before starting any server.
